Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Data: I need to calculate the total duration for each Case ID and look at the flow of activities within each case. Case 2001: Start: 2024-04-01 09:00 End: 2024-04-01 10:30 Duration: 1.5 hours. Flow: Submit -> Evaluate -> Approve -> Pay -> Close. No Request Additional Documents. Case 2002: Duration: ~26 hours. Flow: Submit -> Evaluate -> Request Docs -> Approve -> Pay -> Close. 1 Request loop.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Identify Performance Issues: Case 2001: 1.5 hours Fast. Case 2002: ~26 hours Slow. Case 2003: ~48 hours Very Slow. Case 2004: 1.25 hours Fast. Case 2005: ~77 hours Extremely Slow. Conclusion: Cases 2002 2003 and 2005 are the performance issues.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze Attributes Root Cause Analysis: Complexity: Low 2001 2004: Fast < 2 hours. Medium 2002: Slow ~26 hours. High 2003 2005: Very Slow 48h & 77h. Correlation: Higher complexity correlates directly with longer duration and more Request Additional Documents loops.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Resource Adjuster: Adjuster Lisa Region B Medium/High: Case 2002 Medium Slow Case 2005 High Very Slow. Hypothesis: Lisa might be less efficient at gathering initial docs or has a higher workload leading to longer wait times between requests.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Region: Region B 2002 2004 2005: One fast two slow. Region A 2001 2003: One fast one slow. Comparison: Region B Lisa seems to have longer wait times between the Request activities and the final Approve.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Process Flow: Low Complexity: 0 loops. Medium: 1 loop. High: 2-3 loops. Key Insight: The primary driver of delay is the number of Request Additional Documents activities. This is driven by Complexity. However how the requests are handled matters.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review and Refine: Check timestamps again. Case 2005: Req 1 Day 1 11:30 -> Req 2 Day 2 17:00 long gap. Case 2003: Req 1 Day 1 11:00 -> Req 2 Day 1 17:00 Same day. Crucial Distinction: Region A Mike was able to send a second request on the same day as the first. Region B Lisa waited until the next day.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Correction: Complexity causes the need for requests but the Resource/Region determines the speed of handling those requests.
